note: Per-skill index: for each observed skill/ability, lists every talent that modifies it, where it sits in the tree, its parsed stat modification, and a mock value showing that modification applied to a normalized baseline of 10. Each modifying talent is tagged with one or more lanes from laneTaxonomy (DMG/CRIT/CDR/CAST/HASTE/SPEED/HEAL/SHIELD/MITIGATION/RESOURCE/COST/DURATION/AOE/CC/ARMOR/SUMMON/MISC), plus cross-cutting behavior flags (PROC, STACK) that describe how the effect triggers rather than what stat it touches. A handful of nodes have unresolved "$xx" template descriptions in the source export - these are flagged rather than guessed at.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of An'she's Blessing by -60 sec.

An'she's Guidance.baseDescription: Increases your Holy critical strike chance by 4% and reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 100%.

Ancient Rites.baseDescription: Increases your Intellect by 6% and causes you to regenerate mana equal to 3% of your maximum mana every 20 sec.

modifyingTalents.description:
Expending Angelic Presence increases your critical strike chance and healing by 1% for 20 seconds, stacking up to 10 times.

Additional applications do not refresh the duration.

Bastion of Hope.baseDescription: Critical strikes now bless you, regenerating 41 + 15% SP mana and increasing all of your primary stats by 10% for 5 seconds.

Bless.baseDescription:
Bless an ally, restoring 5% of their maximum health every 10 sec for 5 minutes.

Can only affect 1 ally at a time.

modifyingTalents.description: Healing a target affected by Bless refunds 25% of the mana cost of the spell.
Radiant Cascade is now guaranteed to critically strike on allies affected by Bless.
Doubles the healing done by Bless.
Empower a Blessed ally to unleash a burst of holy energy in front of them, dealing 32 + 150% healing Holy damage enemies in a 10 yd frontal cone and generating additional threat.
Protect a Blessed ally, making them immune to all damage for 4 seconds but reducing their damage and healing done by -25%.
Guard a Blessed ally, deflecting the next harmful spell cast on them within 1 minute.

Redeem a Blessed ally for 20 seconds, granting 25% increased haste and 10% increased damage.

If the ally falls below 35% maximum health they are healed for 10% of their direct damage dealt for the remaining duration.

Blessed Armor.baseDescription: Increases your spell power by 1 for every 125 Armor you have.

Blessed Bulwark.baseDescription: Avoiding an attack now has a 25% chance to regenerate 5% of your base mana.

Blessed One.baseDescription: Increases your chance to block by 5% and reduces the duration of movement slowing effects by -20%.

modifyingTalents.description: Enemies struck by Blessing of Absolution now deal -20% reduced damage for 5 seconds.
Removes the damage penalty provided by Blessing of Purity.
Increases the duration of Blessing of Purity by 2 sec.
Your Fire damage dealt is increased by 10% against Burning targets.

Calm.baseDescription:
Calm an enemy, disarming their melee and ranged weapons for 6 seconds.

If your target is an Undead or Demon, they are also unable to attack or move for 6 seconds. 

Enemies that are immune to silence effects cannot be affected by this.

modifyingTalents.description: Dealing direct damage to an enemy affected by Chains of Light will now cause it to chain to a nearby enemy. Can only occur once per sec.
Increases the duration of Champion of the Sun and Chains of Light by 5 sec.

Champion of the Sun.baseDescription: Become a champion of An'she, causing your melee auto attacks to deal an additional 50% of the damage dealt as Holy damage. Lasts 20 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the duration of Champion of the Sun and Chains of Light by 5 sec.
Direct Physical damage dealt now reduces the cooldown of Champion of the Sun by -1 sec.
Reduces the mana cost of Paragon, Chosen of the Light, and Judgement Day by -50%.
Start anew, reseting the cooldown of Paragon, Chosen of the Light, and Judgement Day.

Circle of Valor.baseDescription: Place a 10 yd holy circle at target location for 15 seconds. Allies that stand inside of it will divert 30% of all damage taken to the caster, and will be healed for 50 + 42.5% SP + 12.5% AP every 2 sec.

Clarity of the Heavens.baseDescription:
Level 50 Passive
Increases your block value by 50% of your Intellect.

modifyingTalents.description: Whenever you use Dawn you now apply Radiance to yourself for 6 sec.RadianceEvery 2 sec you burst with light, healing nearby allies for 36 + 20% SP + 10% AP and damaging nearby enemies for 37 + 40% SP + 15% AP. Lasts 10 seconds.
Allows Dawn to affect 5 additional casts.
Dawn will now provide an additional effect based on your specialization.
Reduces the cast time of Dawnsear by -20% while Dawn is active.
Casting Dawn now grants Scorch Marks.Scorch MarksYour next Radiant Flame has no mana cost, ticks -50% faster, and its duration is reduced by -50%.
While Dawn is active, damage dealt by Radiant Flame now reduces the cooldown of Dawnfall and Solar Concord by -1 sec.
Activating Dawn now grants Shining Shield for 8 seconds.Shining ShieldIncreases your Armor contribution from your shield by 50%.

Slam an enemy every 1 sec with the might of the sun, dealing 28 + 15.94% AP Holy damage and stunning them for 1 seconds. Lasts 3 seconds.

Only usable while Dawn is active. Usable while moving.
Activating Dawn now reduces the cooldowns of Radiance, Valkyr's Calling, and Sunslam by 10%.
Activate your pendant of the sun, refreshing the duration and all charges of Dawn.

Dawnbreak.baseDescription: Radiate holy light from your shield on enemies in front of you, dealing 23 + 25% SP + 10% AP Holyfire Damage, scaling with your block value.

modifyingTalents.description: Dawnbreak now unleashes a burst of holy energy after a 1 seconds delay, dealing 22 + 12.5% holy SP + 10% AP Holy damage to nearby enemies.
Increases the critical strike chance of Gavels and Dawnbreak by 5%.
Increases the critical strike chance of Dawnbreak by 20% and your Seraphic Bulwark now lasts for 4 additional blocks.
Casting Dawnbreak now has a 40% chance to reset the cooldown of Gavels and causes the next one to not incur a cooldown.

Critical strikes with Gavels or Dawnbreak now increases the healing of your next Illumination within 20 seconds by 15%, stacking up to 3 times.

Consuming the stacks increases your critical block chance and movement speed by 10% for 8 seconds.
While Dawn is active, damage dealt by Radiant Flame now reduces the cooldown of Dawnfall and Solar Concord by -1 sec.

Dawnsear.baseDescription: Blast an enemy with burning light, dealing 88 + 100% fire SP Fire damage.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Dawnsear and Sunflare now have a 40% chance to grant Scorch Marks for 10 seconds.Scorch MarksYour next Radiant Flame has no mana cost, ticks -50% faster, and its duration is reduced by -50%.
Reduces the cast time of Dawnsear by -20% while Dawn is active.
Reduces the cast time and mana cost of Dawnsear and Sunflare by -20%.
Increases the critical strike chance of Sunflare and Dawnsear by 6% and reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 100%.
Increases the spell damage bonus of Dawnsear by 20% and Sunflare by 10%.

Casting Rapture now causes your next Dawnsear within 10 seconds to strike your target twice and launch a Solar Flare at the target.Solar Flare (Damage)Deals 137 + 26% SP Holyflame Damage and reduces the target's chance to hit by -3% for 10 seconds.
Damage dealt by Radiant Flame now has an 15% chance to grant you Spears of Glory.Spears of GloryYour next Dawnsear within 10 seconds is instant cast and deals 25% increased damage.

Daybreak.baseDescription: Make a prayer, healing an ally for 155 + 59.5% healing.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Daybreak now causes your next 2 Shines within 10 seconds to have a -25% reduced cast time.
Increases healing of Illumination and Daybreak by 10%.
Increases the effectiveness of your Devotions by 20%.

Divine Retribution.baseDescription: Accumulates 25% of your damage dealt to on the target and unleashes it after 8 seconds, damaging enemies within 10 yds as Holy damage.

Divine Right.baseDescription: Increases your chance to critically strike and to parry attacks by 4% and your spell hit chance by 10%.

Divine Vision.baseDescription: Increases your Holy damage and healing done by 8%.

Enveloped in Light.baseDescription: Increases your armor contribution from mail and plate items by 20% and reduces Shadow damage taken by -6%.

Faith.baseDescription: Direct healing done now increases the target's Armor by 10% for 20 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Fervor of the Sun now stacks up to 3 additional times.
Fulfilling a Vow now reduces the cooldown of Horusath Blast by -2 sec.

Level 40 Passive
Increases the effectiveness of your Fulfillment effects by 25%.

In addition, the Fulfillment effect granted by Vow of Dawn now triples the amount of targets struck.

Applying Vow of the Eclipse now blinds enemies struck, increasing their chance to miss their next attack by -10% for 6 seconds, stacking 5 times. Does not work on bosses.

In addition, increases the effectiveness of the Fulfillment effect of Vow of the Eclipse by 100%.

Auto attacks generate 1 Solar Power and deal 10% increased damage.

Fulfillment: Melee ability damage triggers an auto attack with each weapon.

Only 1 Vow can be active at a time.
While Vow of Light is active, your Gavel of Light now restores an additional 100% health equal to the damage dealt.
Reduces the cooldown of Gavels and Horusath Blast by -20%.
Increases the critical strike chance of Gavels and Dawnbreak by 5%.
Increases the effectiveness of Gavels by 25%.
Casting Dawnbreak now has a 40% chance to reset the cooldown of Gavels and causes the next one to not incur a cooldown.
Increases the critical damage of Gavels by 15% and they are now guaranteed to critically strike against Undead enemies.

Critical strikes with Gavels or Dawnbreak now increases the healing of your next Illumination within 20 seconds by 15%, stacking up to 3 times.

Consuming the stacks increases your critical block chance and movement speed by 10% for 8 seconds.
Increases the effectiveness of Gavels and Horusath Blast and reduces their mana cost by -20%.

Gift of the Sun.baseDescription: Increases your critical strike chance with Holy spells and abilities by 50% on enemies above 80% health.

Glare.baseDescription: Flash powerful light that deals 20 + 27.41% SP Holy damage and stuns enemies within 8 yds for 5 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Removes the cast time of Glare while above 80% health.
Reduces the cooldown of Glare by -30 sec.

Glaring Rays.baseDescription:
Increases the spell haste of all party and raid members by 3% and your spell haste by an additional 3%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Gleaming Armor.baseDescription: Reduces your spell damage taken by -5%, plus an additional -5% while above 80% health.

Gleaming Vigil.baseDescription: Reduces your Physical damage taken by -5%, plus an additional 5% while above 80% health.

Glorious Execution.baseDescription: Strike with both weapons dealing Weapon Damage plus 8 Physical damage and regenerate mana equal to 5% of the damage dealt.

modifyingTalents.description: Melee attacks now have a 20% chance to reset the cooldown of Glorious Execution.
While Vow of Grace is active, your Glorious Execution now regenerates an additional 15% mana equal to the damage dealt.
Casting Horusath Blast now resets the cooldown of Glorious Execution.
Your Glorious Execution now ignores -20% of the target's armor while Vow of the Valkyr is active.
Your Glorious Execution now has a 20% chance to strike 1 additional time.

Grace.baseDescription: Increases your chance to dodge by 5%.

Hammer of Kings.baseDescription: Become anointed by the light, summoning a blessed hammer that encircles you dealing 43 + 12% AP + 22% holy SP Holyfire Damage to nearby enemies every 3 sec for 12 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Hammer of Kings now also increases your critical strike chance by 10% for 10 seconds.
Critical strikes now reduce the cooldown of Hammer of Kings and Solar Prayer by -1.

Blocking attacks now has a 30% chance to grant you Hammer of Kings for 4 sec. 

If Hammer of Kings is already active, you increase the duration by 4 sec.Hammer of KingsBecome anointed by the light, summoning a blessed hammer that encircles you dealing 43 + 12% AP + 22% holy SP Holyfire Damage to nearby enemies every 3 sec for 12 seconds.

Holy Form.baseDescription: Ascend into a holy form, increasing your healing done by 10%, increasing your Holy critical strike chance by 5%, and reducing your threat generated by -50%.

modifyingTalents.description: Doubles the effectiveness of your Holy Form.

Holy Strength.baseDescription:
Level 30 Passive
Increases your spell power by 100% of your Strength.

Horusath Blast.baseDescription: Blast an enemy with the power of the sun, dealing 73 + 100% holy SP Holy damage and reducing their attack power by 235 for 15 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Gavels and Horusath Blast by -20%.

Resets the cooldown of Horusath Blast while in Sunrise and Rapture while in Sunset and causes their damage dealt to launch a Solar Flare. Lasts 15 seconds.Solar Flare (Damage)Deals 137 + 26% SP Holyflame Damage and reduces the target's chance to hit by -3% for 10 seconds.

Damage dealt by Horusath Blast now grants you Light of Absolution for 10 seconds.Lights of AbsolutionDamage dealt by Solar Flares now restores 2% missing health, Energy, Focus, Runic Power, and Rage to allies within 40 yds. Can only occur once every 0.5 sec.

Damage dealt by Horusath Blast now launches a Solar Flare at up to 5 enemies within 5 yds of your target.Solar Flare (Damage)Deals 137 + 26% SP Holyflame Damage and reduces the target's chance to hit by -3% for 10 seconds.
Increases the damage of Horusath Blast and Rapture by 30%.
Horusath Blast or Rapture now have a 20% chance to not incur a cooldown on cast.

Level 50 Passive
While in Sunrise, the remaining cooldown of Horusath Blast is reduced by 10% every 1 sec.

While in Sunset, the remaining cooldown of Rapture is reduced by 10% every 1 sec.
Increases the effectiveness of Gavels and Horusath Blast and reduces their mana cost by -20%.

Level 30 Passive
Your Horusath Blast now deals additional damage scaling with your attack power and grants allies Replenishment.ReplenishmentRestores 1% maximum mana every 5 sec to allies within 100 yds for 15 seconds.
Fulfilling a Vow now reduces the cooldown of Horusath Blast by -2 sec.
Casting Horusath Blast now resets the cooldown of Glorious Execution.
Reduces the cast time of Illumination by 0.25 sec.
Increases healing of Illumination and Daybreak by 10%.
Healing with Illumination and Shine now additionally heals the target's nearby allies for 10% of the value.

Effectively healing with Radiant Cascade has a 20% chance to increase the healing of your next Illumination by 20%. 

Effectively healing with Illumination has a 40% chance to increase the healing of your next Radiant Cascade by 20%.

Reduces the cooldown of Solar Invigoration by -30 sec.

In addition, whenever allies effectively heal with Shine they now cast Illumination. Can only occur once every 6 sec.Illumination (Rank 11)Illuminate an ally, healing them for 1373 + 68% healing.
Healing done by Shine or Illumination now increases the targets movement speed by 20% for 3 seconds.

Level 10 Passive
Avoiding an attack now has a 20% chance to grant you Angelic Presence.Angelic PresenceYour next Illumination within 15 seconds is instant cast and free of cost.
Your Illumination now shields you for 30% of the amount healed.

You now emit an aura that causes all nearby allies to receive 6% increased healing. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, the healing done by Illumination is increased by 20%.

Your Solar Invocation spells now causes your Illumination to heal an additional nearby ally at 70% effectiveness for 10 seconds.

In addition, Illumination now reduces the cooldown of Solar Invocation spells by -1 sec.

Critical strikes with Gavels or Dawnbreak now increases the healing of your next Illumination within 20 seconds by 15%, stacking up to 3 times.

Consuming the stacks increases your critical block chance and movement speed by 10% for 8 seconds.

Impartial.baseDescription: Increases your Strength and maximum mana by 10% and your expertise by 10.

modifyingTalents.description:
Your Judgement Day now applies Suncharged to the target every 1 sec, stacking 10 times.

At the end of the duration, or when Judgement Day ends, the enemy takes 487 + 30% AP + 50% holy SP Holy damage, increased for each stack on the target.
Reduces the mana cost of Paragon, Chosen of the Light, and Judgement Day by -50%.
Start anew, reseting the cooldown of Paragon, Chosen of the Light, and Judgement Day.
Reduces the cooldown of Judgement Day by -15 sec.

Justicar's Wrath.baseDescription: Bring holy wrath down upon an enemy, dealing 508 + 55% SP + 25% AP High Threat Holy damage and increasing the target's spell damage taken by 10% for 15 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Justicar's Wrath now deals an additional 50% of its damage dealt to the target and enemies around them, healing you for 10% of the damage dealt.

Justice.baseDescription:
Spin and strike with both weapons dealing 40% Weapon Damage plus 6 + 20% fire SP to up to 5 enemies within 5 yds.

Your main-hand strike will deal Fire damage and your off-hand strike will deal Physical damage.

modifyingTalents.description: Damage dealt by Justice now has an 8% chance to reset its own cooldown.

Damage dealt by Horusath Blast now grants you Light of Absolution for 10 seconds.Lights of AbsolutionDamage dealt by Solar Flares now restores 2% missing health, Energy, Focus, Runic Power, and Rage to allies within 40 yds. Can only occur once every 0.5 sec.

Light of the Sun.baseDescription: Parrying an attack now restores 3% of your maximum health and increases your chance to parry the next attack by 30%.

March of the Valkyr.baseDescription:
Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, your chance to parry is increased by 5%.

Mercy.baseDescription: Grant mercy to an ally, abolishing 2 disease effects, repeating every 3 sec for 12 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the tick rate of Mercy by -50%, but increases its mana cost by 100%.
Your Mercy now affects 4 additional allies near the primary target.
Reduces the mana cost of Paragon, Chosen of the Light, and Judgement Day by -50%.
Start anew, reseting the cooldown of Paragon, Chosen of the Light, and Judgement Day.
Casting Sunslam now reduces the cooldown of Pendant of the Sun by -10 sec.

Photosynthetic.baseDescription: Increases your spell haste by 9%, plus an additional 3% during the day.

Protector of the Flame.baseDescription:
Avoiding an attack now also deals 648% fire SP + 3% AP Fire damage to the attacker.

Can only occur once per sec.

Pure Light.baseDescription: While above 80% health you now deal 10% increased damage and healing.

Radiance.baseDescription: Every 2 sec you burst with light, healing nearby allies for 36 + 20% SP + 10% AP and damaging nearby enemies for 37 + 40% SP + 15% AP. Lasts 10 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the healing and damage of Radiance by 125%.

Effectively healing with Radiant Cascade has a 20% chance to increase the healing of your next Illumination by 20%. 

Effectively healing with Illumination has a 40% chance to increase the healing of your next Radiant Cascade by 20%.

Savior.baseDescription: Increases your healing on targets below 20% health by 30%.

Additionally, when Scorch Marks are consumed you now gain 10% increased Magic damage for 8 seconds.

Scroll of Hope.baseDescription:
Read from a scroll of hope, reducing Magic damage taken by party and raid members within 15 yds by -30% for 10 seconds.

If any ally falls below 35% of their maximum health while this is active they are instantly healed once for 15% of their maximum health.

This ability is guaranteed to critically strike against Undead or Demons.

Solar Invocation: Revelation.baseDescription: Invoke An'she to root an enemy for 4 seconds with holy shackles or heal an ally for 10% maximum health and increase their movement speed by 50% for 4 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Invoke the spirit of An'she to instantly generate 10 Solar Power and refunds 10% of your maximum mana.

Solar Prayer.baseDescription:
Recite a solar prayer, instantly healing you for 25% of your maximum health plus an additional 100 + 100% SP, scaling with spell power.

Usable while stunned.

Stalwart.baseDescription: Melee critical strikes against you prevent you from being critically struck again for 4 seconds.

Stand Against Darkness.baseDescription: During the day you now deal -10% more Holy damage and take -10% reduced periodic damage.

Struck by the Sun.baseDescription:
Level 30 Passive
Increases your Holy and Fire spell damage by 30% and your spell hit rating by 6% of your Intellect.

Sun Gate.baseDescription:
Shift 25 yds forward at light speed, removing all root effects.

This leaves behind a Sun Gate for 15 seconds that allies can interact with to blink themselves the same distance forward. Allies can only use Sun Gate every 90 seconds.

Sun Shield.baseDescription: Reduces your chance to be hit by spells by -3%.

Sun Stride.baseDescription: Rush forward at a high speed for 2 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Sun Stride by -4 sec.

Sun Worship.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your healing power by 15% of your Intellect and your spell haste rating by 25% of your Intellect.

Sun-Touched Armor.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your Armor by 150% of your Strength and Intellect and increases your total Stamina by 15%.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Dawnsear and Sunflare now have a 40% chance to grant Scorch Marks for 10 seconds.Scorch MarksYour next Radiant Flame has no mana cost, ticks -50% faster, and its duration is reduced by -50%.
Reduces the cast time and mana cost of Dawnsear and Sunflare by -20%.
Increases the critical strike chance of Sunflare and Dawnsear by 6% and reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 100%.
Increases the spell damage bonus of Dawnsear by 20% and Sunflare by 10%.

Resets the cooldown of Horusath Blast while in Sunrise and Rapture while in Sunset and causes their damage dealt to launch a Solar Flare. Lasts 15 seconds.Solar Flare (Damage)Deals 137 + 26% SP Holyflame Damage and reduces the target's chance to hit by -3% for 10 seconds.
Increases the effectiveness of Sunrise and Sunset by 20%.
Entering Sunset or Sunrise increases your spell haste by 20%. Lasts for 10 seconds or 3 casts.

Level 50 Passive
While in Sunrise, the remaining cooldown of Horusath Blast is reduced by 10% every 1 sec.

While in Sunset, the remaining cooldown of Rapture is reduced by 10% every 1 sec.

Resets the cooldown of Horusath Blast while in Sunrise and Rapture while in Sunset and causes their damage dealt to launch a Solar Flare. Lasts 15 seconds.Solar Flare (Damage)Deals 137 + 26% SP Holyflame Damage and reduces the target's chance to hit by -3% for 10 seconds.
Increases the effectiveness of Sunrise and Sunset by 20%.
Entering Sunset or Sunrise increases your spell haste by 20%. Lasts for 10 seconds or 3 casts.

Level 50 Passive
While in Sunrise, the remaining cooldown of Horusath Blast is reduced by 10% every 1 sec.

While in Sunset, the remaining cooldown of Rapture is reduced by 10% every 1 sec.
Reduces the channel time of Sunslam by 1 sec.
Fulfilling a Vow now increases the damage of your Sunslam by 10% for 1 minute, stacking 5 times.
Activating Dawn now reduces the cooldowns of Radiance, Valkyr's Calling, and Sunslam by 10%.
Casting Sunslam now reduces the cooldown of Pendant of the Sun by -10 sec.

Sunsworn.baseDescription: Increases your Physical damage dealt by 6% and auto attacks now have a 10% chance to restore 3% of your maximum mana.

modifyingTalents.description: Each stack of Sunwalker now increases the critical strike chance of Shine by 3%.

Sunwell.baseDescription: Become an embodiment of the sun for 30 seconds that periodically dispels fear, sleep, and charm effects every 3 sec from allies within 40 yds.

modifyingTalents.description: When the absorption shield from The Chosen is depleted, it explodes for 80 + 25% AP + 45% holy SP Holy damage, split between enemies within 8 yds.

The Redeemer.baseDescription:
Level 50 Passive
When you critically heal your target, they will be healed for 30% of the amount originally healed the next time they take damage. Lasts 15 seconds.

Valiance.baseDescription: Increases your melee attack speed by 15% and your first auto attack on a target hits twice.

Valkyr's Calling.baseDescription:
Target an enemy and leap into the air, becoming immune to all physical attacks and spells for 2 seconds. 

At the end of the duration, you charge back down, dealing 428 + 100% AP + 22.5% SP Holy damage to all enemies within 8 yds.

modifyingTalents.description: Activating Dawn now reduces the cooldowns of Radiance, Valkyr's Calling, and Sunslam by 10%.
Increases the duration of Valkyr's Calling by 1 sec.
Increases the critical strike chance of Valkyr's Calling by 50%.

Valkyr's Grip.baseDescription: Increases your off-hand Weapon Damage dealt by 40% and reduces the duration of disarm effects by -30%.

Valkyrie's Watch.baseDescription: Damage that would take you below 35% health and damage taken while below 35% health is reduced by 25%.

Valorous Champion.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your attack power by 25% and your spell hit rating by 5% of your Strength.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 10 Passive
Fulfilling your Vow now unleashes Sunlight restoring 25 + 15% healing health to up to 5 allies within 40 yds, prioritizing the lowest health allies.
Fulfilling a Vow now increases your block chance by 2% for 15 seconds, stacking 5 times.
Fulfilling a Vow now increases the damage of your Sunslam by 10% for 1 minute, stacking 5 times.
Fulfilling a Vow now reduces the cooldown of Horusath Blast by -2 sec.

Auto attacks generate 1 Solar Power and deal 10% increased damage.

Fulfillment: Melee ability damage triggers an auto attack with each weapon.

Only 1 Vow can be active at a time.

Fulfilling your Vow now unleashes a chain of light at your target, dealing 91 + 23% holy SP + 10% AP Holy damage and then bouncing to up to 5 additional enemies, dealing reduced damage with each strike.

Level 40 Passive
Increases the effectiveness of your Fulfillment effects by 25%.

In addition, the Fulfillment effect granted by Vow of Dawn now triples the amount of targets struck.
Fulfilling your Vow of Grace now also reduces the cooldown of the triggered ability by 10%.
Increases the mana restored by Vow of Grace by 100%.
While Vow of Grace is active, your Glorious Execution now regenerates an additional 15% mana equal to the damage dealt.
Your Vow of Light now heals for an additional 5% of damage taken or direct healing done by you.
While Vow of Light is active, your Gavel of Light now restores an additional 100% health equal to the damage dealt.

Applying Vow of the Eclipse now blinds enemies struck, increasing their chance to miss their next attack by -10% for 6 seconds, stacking 5 times. Does not work on bosses.

In addition, increases the effectiveness of the Fulfillment effect of Vow of the Eclipse by 100%.
Your Glorious Execution now ignores -20% of the target's armor while Vow of the Valkyr is active.

Level 50 Passive
Doubles the effectiveness of Vow of the Valkyr.

Warmth.baseDescription: Direct healing now increases the target's health by 300 for 15 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Invoke the grace of An'she for 8 seconds, causing your llluminations to be instant cast and guaranteed to critically strike, but cost 100% more mana.
